Package org.areslib.hardware.interfaces

Interface AresAbsoluteEncoder

All Superinterfaces:
AresEncoder
All Known Implementing Classes:
AnalogAbsoluteEncoderWrapper, AresOctoQuadSensor, AresSrsSensor, RevEncoderWrapper, SrsHubEncoderWrapper
public interface AresAbsoluteEncoder extends AresEncoder
Extension of AresEncoder that adds support for absolute positioning. Typically used for Swerve Drive steering or absolute arm joints.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    double
    getAbsolutePositionRad()
    Gets the absolute position of the encoder.
    void
    setOffset(double offsetRad)
    Sets the zero offset for formatting the absolute position.

    Methods inherited from interface org.areslib.hardware.interfaces.AresEncoder

    getPosition, getVelocity, setDistancePerPulse

  • Method Details

    • getAbsolutePositionRad

      double getAbsolutePositionRad()
      Gets the absolute position of the encoder.
      Returns:
      the absolute position in radians (0 to 2PI)

    • setOffset

      void setOffset(double offsetRad)
      Sets the zero offset for formatting the absolute position.
      Parameters:
      offsetRad - Offset in radians.
